name: WebPilot Extension Error Handling System
description: Comprehensive error handling, tracking, and automated GitHub issue creation for WebPilot extension

error-handler.js.purpose: Centralized error tracking and logging for the extension

methods.track(error, context): Log an error with context information
methods.exportErrors(): Export errors with metadata for reporting

features: Memory-bounded error queue (max 50 in-memory, 100 in storage)
URL and timestamp tracking for debugging

safeChrome(operation, fallback).purpose: Safe wrapper for chrome API calls

sendMessageSafe(message, options).purpose: Safe messaging with automatic timeout and error handling

reportErrorsToBackend(backendUrl).purpose: Send collected errors to backend for analysis

ci.yml.purpose: Main CI/CD pipeline with enhanced extension checking

extension-error-checker.yml.purpose: Scheduled and on-demand error checking with automatic GitHub issue creation

steps: Automatic GitHub issue creation or update

issue-creation.behavior: Creates new issue or updates existing open issue with same title

.eslintrc.json.purpose: ESLint configuration for extension code quality

package.json.purpose: Node.js configuration for extension dev tools

steps: 5. Fail job if errors found (exit code 1)
pull-request.outcome: PR can only merge if all checks pass

steps: 6. Create new issue or update existing

extension-runtime: 1. error-handler.js loaded in all extension scripts
4. Users can export errors from extension options
5. Backend can receive errors via reportErrorsToBackend()

step-1-load-error-handler.description: Include error-handler.js in your extension scripts
step-1-load-error-handler.script-update: Add <script src="error-handler.js"></script> to HTML files or import in JS files

step-2-wrap-chrome-calls.description: Replace direct chrome.* calls with safe wrappers

step-4-configure-backend.description: Optional: Set up backend error reporting
step-4-configure-backend.setup: Configure backend URL and call reportErrorsToBackend(backendUrl) periodically

github-issue-example.title: 🐛 Extension errors detected (42 issues)
github-issue-example.body:
## Automated Extension Error Report

**Timestamp:** 2025-06-04T12:00:00Z
**Branch:** main

## Lint Errors

### background.js
- Line 45: 'STATE' is assigned a value but never used (no-unused-vars)
- Line 112: Missing semicolon (semi)

### content.js
- Line 23: Expected '===' but got '==' (eqeqeq)

---
This issue was automatically created by the Extension Error Checker workflow.

usage-examples.safe-storage: const data = await safeStor.get(['templates']); await safeStor.set({lastUsed: Date.now()});

monitoring.artifacts: Extension lint reports stored in GitHub Actions artifacts (30-day retention)
monitoring.issues: Automatic GitHub issues for tracking errors across versions
monitoring.storage: chrome.storage.local keeps error history (up to 100 errors)
monitoring.dashboard: View error trends in GitHub Issues with 'extension-errors' label
